stemHtml: Globe Air 621, SELCAL code ALBM. What is the correct SELCAL check request?

options.a: Globe Air 621 on 8891, request SELCAL check ALBM.
options.b: Gander radio, Globe Air 621, request SELCAL verification.
options.c: Globe Air 621 request SELCAL verification from Gander radio, ALBM.
options.d: Gander radio, Globe Air 621 request SELCAL check, ALBM.
